criteria.name: Functionality and Utility
criteria.description: The breadth and depth of useful features offered by the app, including AI-powered capabilities like content generation, summarization, automation, and task assistance.
criteria.sources: Multiple sources detailing app features and capabilities

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: Aggregate user feedback indicating satisfaction, ease of use, and overall app quality.

criteria.name: AI Model Sophistication
criteria.description: The underlying AI model's capabilities (e.g., GPT-4o, Claude 3 Opus), including reasoning, accuracy, and multimodality.

criteria.name: Integration and Compatibility
criteria.description: How well the app integrates with other platforms and services, and its compatibility across different devices and operating systems.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, technical specifications

criteria.name: Cost and Accessibility
criteria.description: The availability of free tiers, trial periods, and subscription pricing, considering the value provided for the cost.
